mapper.select: SELECT INQUIRY_NO , NICKNAME , INQUIRY_TITLE , INQUIRY_CONTENT , COUNT , IB.CREATE_DATE , IB.MODIFY_DATE FROM INQUIRY_BOARD IB LEFT JOIN PLU_USER PU ON(IB.USER_ID = PU.USER_ID) WHERE IB.STATUS = 'Y' ORDER BY IB.CREATE_DATE DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{boardLimit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INQUIRY_BOARD WHERE STATUS = 'Y'
